description: India Book (IB) I, 35: The widow of Abu al-Barakat, the son of Yosef Lebdi, buys a sixth of two adjacent stores for 53 and three/fourths dinars. The widow was Sitt al-Sada, daughter of Abu Nasr al-Tinnisi. This same share of the two stores was bought at an earlier date by Abu al-Fadil, a physician, from his two nephews. These nephews retained the right to buy. Dated: first 10 days of Tammuz, 1454 Sel (= June 1143).
tags: bill of sale, India, ib-untranslated-eng, real estate, IB1
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
